title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 17–18, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In the end, the only one I can count on is me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't want to end up killing you.

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
